sections.heading: Explore the PCBWay Brochure to Learn About Our Capabilities
sections.text: Blog > Explore the PCBWay Brochure to Learn About Our Capabilities Explore the PCBWay Brochure to Learn About Our Capabilities by: Mila Mar 25,2026 4677 Views 0 Comments Posted in News What’s Inside the Brochure? This document provides a structured overview of PCB manufacturing and assembly capabilities, making it easier for engineers and sourcing teams to make informed decisions. You’ll find detailed information on: PCB Types & Technologies: Including multilayer PCBs, HDI boards, rigid-flex, and advanced structures Manufacturing Capabilities: Line width/spacing, minimum drill size, copper thickness, and board thickness Materials & Surface Finishes: FR4, high-frequency materials, ENIG, HASL...
